meaning: n.血管,静脉,叶脉,翅脉,矿脉,纹理,性情,心绪vt.使成脉络,象脉络般分布于
examples: A tiny wire is threaded through a vein to the heart.
He could have died after developing deep vein thrombosis during a flight to Sydney.
Passengers on long-haul flights are being warned about the risks of deep vein thrombosis.
In a similar vein reservations were expressed about the screen technology that Samsung has available.
In the same vein, Ms. Acra generally avoids strapless dresses in the spring and summer.
